name: Udyogini Scheme
benefits: Loan up to ₹3,00,000 with subsidy (50% SC/ST, 30% others)
details: Udyogini Scheme helps women become self-employed by providing financial support through banks. It offers subsidy on loans and encourages small business activities like tailoring, food processing, and handicrafts.

name: Shrama Shakthi Scheme
benefits: Loan of ₹50,000 with 4% interest. 50% subsidy if repaid properly.
details: Shrama Shakthi Scheme provides financial support and skill training to minority entrepreneurs in Karnataka. It offers a loan of ₹50,000 at low interest and encourages small business activities. If the loan is repaid on time, 50% is converted into subsidy.

name: Arivu Education Loan Scheme
benefits: Loan from ₹50,000 to ₹5,00,000 per year. 2% service charge after course completion.
steps: Receive application ID and wait for approval
details: Arivu Education Loan Scheme supports minority students in Karnataka by providing financial assistance for professional courses like engineering, medical, and management.

name: Bhagya Lakshmi Scheme
benefits: Financial assistance up to ₹34,751 at age 18, annual scholarship (₹300–₹1,000), and health insurance up to ₹25,000 per year
steps: Download application form from official website
Submit to Anganwadi or local office
details: Bhagya Lakshmi Scheme supports girl children in Karnataka by providing financial assistance, scholarships, and insurance benefits to families below the poverty line.

name: Vidyasiri Scheme
benefits: Free hostel, food, and fee assistance
details: Provides hostel, food, and fee support to backward class students pursuing higher education.

name: Post Matric Scholarship (Karnataka)
details: Supports students after Class 10 to continue education in colleges and professional courses.

name: Pre Matric Scholarship (Karnataka)
details: Encourages school education among economically weaker and minority students.
